name: Zdog — 3D Flat-Shaded Geometry
description: Pseudo-3D engine for spinning cubes, spheres and custom shapes on canvas. No WebGL, no build step. Add a canvas with class zdog-canvas.
body:
<script src="https://unpkg.com/zdog@1/dist/zdog.dist.min.js"></script>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-zdog]').forEach(function (canvasEl) {
      var color = canvasEl.getAttribute('data-zdog-color') || '#5b4dff';
      var bg = canvasEl.getAttribute('data-zdog-bg') || 'transparent';
      canvasEl.style.background = bg;
      var illo = new Zdog.Illustration({ element: canvasEl, dragRotate: true });
      new Zdog.Box({ addTo: illo, width: 64, height: 64, depth: 64, stroke: false,
        color: color, leftFace: color, rightFace: color, topFace: color, bottomFace: color });
      function animate() { illo.rotate.y += 0.02; illo.rotate.x += 0.01; illo.updateRenderGraph(); requestAnimationFrame(animate); }
      animate();
    });
  });
</script>
